message:
🐛 Fix flickering and add cluster selectors to dashboard cards

- Fix flickering when switching clusters (show skeleton only when loading AND no data)
- Add cluster selectors to PVCStatus and ResourceUsage cards
- Add ClusterBadge to NamespaceEvents and PVCStatus list items
- Fix KustomizationStatus stats to use totalItems instead of paginated length

Affected cards:
- ArgoCDApplications
- ArgoCDHealth
- ArgoCDSyncStatus
- KustomizationStatus
- NamespaceEvents
- NamespaceRBAC
- PVCStatus
- ResourceUsage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
